title: Agent Citation
description: One entry in a run-time agent's citations[] block. Every skill, template, decision-tree branch, MCP tool, or probe recipe the agent consulted gets one entry.

id.description: For skill/template/standard/decision_tree/probe: the repo-relative identifier (e.g. admin/permission-set-architecture). For mcp_tool: the tool name (e.g. tooling_query).

path.description: Repo-relative path that the id resolves to. Omit for mcp_tool entries.

branch.description: For decision_tree: the specific branch or Q-number that resolved the choice (e.g. "Q3 — async callout").

used_for.description: One-line rationale for consulting this citation.
